category_sources: source_facts.description says Java garbage collection visualization tool; official GitHub README describes visualizing verbose GC output from Java VMs.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage points to chewiebug/GCViewer; official repository title and README use GCViewer.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains usage and supported GC log formats; official GitHub wiki is linked as project documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official chewiebug/GCViewer GitHub project; README is the repository root.
tags_sources: source_facts.description; official README describes JVM GC log visualization, reports, charts, and supported Java VM log formats.
